_meta.notes: KoDo · Editor — universal JSON-editor. Bakgrunner og branding kan endres her uten kode-deploy.

backgrounds.name: Slate Night
backgrounds.css: radial-gradient(1200px 800px at 10% -10%, rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.10), transparent 50%), radial-gradient(1000px 700px at 110% 0%, rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.08), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(800px 600px at 50% 110%, rgba(244, 114, 182, 0.06), transparent 55%), #050816

backgrounds.name: Paper Light
backgrounds.css: radial-gradient(1200px 600px at 10% -10%, rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.08), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(1000px 500px at 110% 10%, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.05), transparent 60%), #FAF7F0

backgrounds.name: Aurora
backgrounds.css: radial-gradient(1400px 900px at 0% 0%, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.20), transparent 50%), radial-gradient(1200px 800px at 100% 100%, rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.18), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(800px 600px at 50% 50%, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.12), transparent 60%), #0A0E1A

backgrounds.name: Sunset
backgrounds.css: radial-gradient(1400px 900px at 0% 100%, rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.22), transparent 50%), radial-gradient(1200px 800px at 100% 0%, rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.18), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(800px 600px at 50% 50%, rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.10), transparent 60%), #1A0B14

backgrounds.name: Forest Mist
backgrounds.css: radial-gradient(1400px 900px at 50% 0%, rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.18), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(1000px 700px at 0% 100%, rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.15), transparent 60%), #061410
